# Kani Estate

> Single-origin coffee and heirloom spices, grown, dried and cured by hand on our family estate in Huila since 1890.

Kani Estate is a small-lot producer selling directly to customers. Every coffee and spice on the site is grown, processed and shipped from the same hillsides that four generations of our family have farmed.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the estate, featured single-origin lots, and current harvests.
- [Shop](/shop): The full catalogue of coffees, spices and gift boxes with tasting notes and prices in INR.
- [Our Story](/story): The estate's history, family, and approach to growing coffee and spices in cedar shade.
- [Journal](/journal): Field notes from the estate — harvests, brewing recipes, and cellar work.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Customer account access (requires authentication).
